name: pdf-ocr
description: Local PDF OCR + tools webapp. Next.js + FastAPI + Ollama.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.dev:api: cd backend && uv run uvicorn src.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix web install && cd backend && uv sync
